channel.title: NAJ Peto, J Carpenter, GD Smith, S Duffy, R Houlston, DJ Hunter, K McPherson, N Pearce, P Romer, P Sasieni, C Turnbull | PlatCOVID

item.title: Weekly COVID-19 testing with household quarantine and contact tracing is feasible and would probably end the epidemic.
